name: Fixer's Tale
short_description: A humorous sci-fi text-driven adventure where you play a support engineer sent to fix system failures in a secret research complex. Explore strange labs, investigate bizarre incidents, solve absurd problems, talk to depressed robots, and make choices that lead to multiple endings.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Camelot-22, a secret research complex where every broken system, unsafe experiment, and bizarre incident somehow becomes your problem.

Fixer’s Tale is a humorous interactive story inspired by classic text adventures. You play a support engineer sent across the facility to investigate failures, deal with eccentric machines, survive questionable working conditions, and somehow keep the place running for one more day.

As you move through the complex, you’ll explore strange locations, solve light puzzles, take part in absurd conversations, uncover secrets, and make choices that affect how the story ends.

What to expect

  • A text-driven sci-fi adventure inspired by classic text adventures

  • A secret research complex full of strange incidents and stranger characters

  • Humor, branching dialogues, and multiple endings

  • Several paths through the story, including hidden outcomes

  • Light puzzles, exploration, and optional discoveries

  • Plenty of references, details, and secrets to uncover

Game features

  • 10 unusual locations across five floors

  • Around 36,000 words of story

  • Multiple endings, including secret ones

  • Multiple routes to the ending

Camelot-22 is falling apart. Grab your toolkit and do what every support engineer does best: walk into chaos and pretend this is a normal workday.
